title: BarPointLoad
description: BarPointLoad: Point load to be applied for Bars, positioned a set distance from the StartNode.

DistanceFromA.description: Distance along the Bar between the StartNode and the load position. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Force.description: Magnitude and direction of the Force. The load requires the Force and/or the Moment Vector to be non-zero to have any effect. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Moment.description: Magnitude and direction of the Moment. The load requires the Force and/or the Moment Vector to be non-zero to have any effect. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which the load is applied. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Objects.description: The group of Bars that the load should be applied to. For most analysis packages the objects added here need to be pulled from the analysis package before being assigned to the load.

Axis.description: Defines whether the load is applied in local or global coordinates.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the element. This means that the load will be reduced when its direction is at an angle to the element.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
